---
format: numbered_diagnostic
close_action: save
---

# HOOK
the 4 tells of every AI carousel. once you see them you can't unsee them.

# TELL #1
tell #1: it has exactly 6 slides. not 5. not 7. always 6. real carousels are sized to the story. 6 is what AI tools default to.

# TELL #2
tell #2: stock backgrounds. or worse a gradient. the visual identity is whatever notion's default template surfaces. nobody's brand actually looks like that.

# TELL #3
tell #3: slide 4 always says nothing. the middle of an AI carousel is padding. the model couldn't think of a real 4th beat so it restated the hook with new words.

# TELL #4
tell #4: it ends on a quote. steve jobs. gandhi. some founder you've never heard of. the model couldn't write a real ending so it borrowed someone else's.

# FIX
the fix is structural. 3 questions before you ship: does slide 1 open a loop? does slide 4 do real work? does slide 7 close the loop you opened?

# CTA
your audience can already see the tells. they just didn't have the words for them. save this. run the 3-question audit on your next 3 carousels before you post.
